results.title: 27 more Indian airports to have DigiYatra by next year
results.description: Passenger data shared with DigiYatra remains encrypted and securely stored on the user's own device, shared only for a limited duration with the origin airport for immediate verification purposes, the ministry said.

results.title: Viral video: CarryMinati recreates PM Narendra Modi- Giorgia Meloni's Melody moment with MrBeast, internet can't handle it: 'No way, it's AI'
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi can make anything viral, and his recent Melody moment with Georgia Meloni has now inspired countless memes, including the one from CarryMinati and MrBeast.
